before_booking.question: How do I make a reservation?
before_booking.answer:
Please inquire with your name, contact info, preferred date/time, and number of concepts.

After consultation, please apply through the reservation system we guide you to, and pay the 90,000 KRW deposit via the Toss notification on KakaoTalk within 4 hours to finalize your booking.

before_booking.question: How much does the shoot cost?
before_booking.answer: Detailed package prices can be checked directly on the Naver Smart Place or the KakaoTalk consultation channel menu. Please refer to the detailed guide for the FITORIAL package.

before_booking.question: Can I be put on a waiting list?
before_booking.answer: We do not currently operate a waiting list for reservations. Since the reservation status changes frequently, please check available dates directly through the reservation system.

before_booking.question: What is the cancellation and refund policy?
before_booking.answer:
A 100% refund of the deposit is possible if canceled 50 days or more before the shoot date.

Cancellations made from 49 days up to the day of the shoot will incur a penalty (90,000 KRW) and are non-refundable. Also, canceling 2 or more times may restrict your ability to book future shoots.

before_booking.question: I want to change my reservation date or time.
before_booking.answer:
Changes can be made only once, up to 50 days before the shoot date.

If you book within 50 days of the shoot date, date changes and full refunds are absolutely not possible regardless of the reason, so please book carefully.

before_booking.question: What if the depositor's name is different from the reservation name?
before_booking.answer: If the depositor's name is different or the reservation information doesn't match the actual person being photographed, you must tell us the date/time of deposit and the depositor's name via the consultation channel to guarantee confirmation without omission.

before_shoot.question: Where can I find information about rental outfits?
before_shoot.answer: You can check FITGIRLS' various background concepts and rental outfit lineup in advance on the website's Lookbook tab.

before_shoot.question: By when do I need to submit my shoot concept draft?
before_shoot.answer:
You must upload a draft of the vibe you want (images, whether you'll rent outfits, etc.) by 1 week before the shoot.
File name example: Name_ShootDate (e.g., JaneDoe_1025)

before_shoot.question: What time should I arrive on the day of the shoot?
before_shoot.answer:
Our policy is for you to arrive 30 minutes before your reservation time.

After arriving, you will change clothes, pump up, prepare oil and Vaseline, and we will begin shooting on time.

before_shoot.question: Are there props or exercise equipment available at the studio?
before_shoot.answer:
Oil and Vaseline are provided, so you do not need to prepare them separately.

You are free to use our pump-up equipment like dumbbells of various weights, bands, and mats, as well as the diverse props featured on FITGIRLS' SNS.

You are also always welcome to bring your own personal props that have special meaning to you.

before_shoot.question: Is parking available?
before_shoot.answer: Please use the paid valet service in front of the studio (10,000 KRW for 2 hours) or paid parking lots in nearby buildings.

after_shoot.question: When and how will I receive the original photos?
after_shoot.answer: We will send all the originals on the day of the shoot via email and Airdrop.

after_shoot.question: How do I select photos for retouching?
after_shoot.answer:
Please personally select the photos you want retouched from the originals you received and reply to inafit@daum.net.

To prevent work errors, you must reply without ever changing the file numbers of the attached files.

You must select the original files within 20 days after the shoot; files may be deleted if this deadline passes.

after_shoot.question: How long does the retouching process take?
after_shoot.answer:
Starting from the day you reply with your photo selection, we will perform preliminary retouching on 1 photo on that same day or the next, and send it back via email.

You will receive the final retouched versions of the remaining photos in about 4 weeks.

after_shoot.question: To what extent is retouching done?
after_shoot.answer:
Retouching is done to maximize skin texture, body lines, and a pictorial mood while maintaining your natural charm.

After the 1st round of edits is completed, you can review the results and request re-edits only once.

Once retouching is finished, we will also create and send a stylish magazine cover unique to FITGIRLS & INAFIT.

after_shoot.question: Is there a way to get additional retouched photos?
after_shoot.answer:
We provide a complimentary retouching of 1 photo for writing a Naver Visitor Review, and 1 photo for consenting to an Instagram upload.

You can purchase additional retouched photos via the FITGIRLS Smart Store (33,000 KRW per photo).

reviews.title: REAL REVIEWS
reviews.subtitle: Proven Quality of FITGIRLS by Real Clients

ai_summary.title: AI Summary
ai_summary.bullet1: Professional directing that makes posing natural even for beginners
ai_summary.bullet2: Extreme satisfaction with delicate retouching and high-quality results
ai_summary.bullet3: Diverse concepts available and high-quality rental outfits

review1.author: jm47
review1.text: It was my first body profile shoot, and the photographer lived up to the reputation. I wasn't fully prepared with outfits, poses, or concepts, but the moment the photographer saw me, he guided me perfectly. I am extremely satisfied! I plan to visit again after building a better body! He catches every detail vividly, so I will definitely come back!

review2.author: JaeHee43
review2.text: Above all, the photographer was so nice!! I was very nervous before the shoot, but he directed me so kindly and captured amazing angles and compositions. The results are some of my prettiest. I was so comfortable that the photoshoot felt like hanging out at a friend's house. Strongly recommended!
